title: In Swaths of Germany, the Far-Right AfD Is Part of the Fabric
summary_full: The Alternative for Germany party, or AfD, is shunned in federal politics but is a regional force. This fall, it could win broader power for the first time.
summary_public: The Alternative for Germany party, or AfD, is shunned in federal politics but is a regional force. This fall, it could win broader power for the first time.
